paella.name: paella
paella.description: It's pretty useless, but it looks delicious. Maybe sell it at the Merchant?

small_potion.name: Small Potion
small_potion.description: A tiny bottle that restores a little health.

large_potion.name: Large Potion
large_potion.description: A stronger potion for rough battles.

spark_tonic.name: Spark Tonic
spark_tonic.description: A fizzy drink that restores a little ability energy.

iron_bark.name: Iron Bark
iron_bark.description: A hard strip of bark that can toughen defenses.

swift_feather.name: Swift Feather
swift_feather.description: A feather that hums with speed.

ember_seed.name: Ember Seed
ember_seed.description: A warm seed often found after fiery fights.

lucky_potato.name: Lucky Potato
lucky_potato.description: A very fortunate potato. Nobody knows why.

cake.name: Cake
cake.description: A big slice of cake that restores a lot of health.

fire_potion.name: Fire Potion
fire_potion.description: Wraps you in a fiery shield that burns attackers.

apple.name: Apple
apple.description: A crisp apple that restores a little health.

ac_cupcake.name: AC Cupcake
ac_cupcake.description: A sugary cupcake that restores ability charges.

iron_helmet.name: Iron Helmet
iron_helmet.description: A heavy helmet that adds 200 defense.

king_crab_helmet.name: King Crab Helmet
king_crab_helmet.description: A regal crab shell helmet with 400 defense.

light_leather_helmet.name: Light Leather Helmet
light_leather_helmet.description: A light helmet that raises max AC by 2.

heavy_leather_helmet.name: Heavy Leather Helmet
heavy_leather_helmet.description: A sturdier leather helmet that adds 50 defense.

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Flexible armor that raises max AC by 3.

ninja_clothes.name: Ninja Clothes
ninja_clothes.description: Light gear that gives a 30% chance to dodge attacks.
